results.title: Operant conditioning paradigms in domestic dogs: a systematic review
results.abstract: We review 84 studies of operant conditioning protocols applied to canine learning, with emphasis on working dogs and behavioral plasticity. Results suggest a robust effect of variable-ratio reinforcement on retention.

results.title: Canine cognition: episodic-like memory revisited
results.abstract: We replicate Fugazza et al. with a larger sample (n=42) and find consistent evidence for episodic-like memory in dogs across breeds.
